name: NGM Biopharmaceuticals, Inc.
description: NGM Biopharmaceuticals, Inc. is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company dedicated to discovering and developing novel, life-changing medicines for patients suffering from serious diseases. Based in South San Francisco, the company leverages deep insights into human biology to advance a diverse pipeline of therapeutic candidates. NGM Bio focuses on addressing significant unmet medical needs, particularly in areas such as cancer, metabolic diseases, and other conditions where the GDF15 pathway plays a critical role. By translating powerful biological research into innovative clinical treatments, NGM Bio aims to make lasting contributions to improve human health and patient outcomes.
